text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Urara... Please think this through again.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it'll be fine! I don't know them, but
I'm sure they're a good person!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Prez wants me to meet someone I've never
met before!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know the student council is involved, but you
still ought to know what you're getting into to be
prepared.
choice_data_list:
Yeah, that worries me too. Let me go with you,
Urara.

Yeah, that worries me too. Let me go with you,
Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Then you come too, Ayabe! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait, why am I—

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
And so, Urara, I want you gorgeously adorning
the posters I'm making to advertise my inn!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
I saw you on TV, during the Umamusume karuta
tournament! The confidence and grace you
showed is perfect for representing this
establishment!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yippee! I'll do my best, of course!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Now that you're on board, I'd
also really like to include that girl who suddenly
joined partway into the tournament!
choice_data_list: The girl who joined partway in?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The Umamusume who showed up in the latter
half of the karuta competition. She had this
dignified prowess about her.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
If I had to describe her, I'd say she was just like...
this fine lady... here...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: I-it's you! What a miraculous coincidence! Please, you have to join the photo shoot for the posters!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but no.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Is, is that so? I understand...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? But why? You should definitely join in,
Ayabe! It's gonna be so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There are plenty of other people more suited to this than I am.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Like someone positive who makes you happy just
looking at her. You'd attract way more customers
by employing someone like that. Right?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: That's wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
You really thought deeply into what would be
profitable for my business! How considerate of
you!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
During the tournament, what kept me on the
edge of my seat was precisely that contemplative
expression of yours, so focused on the match!
Your cooperation is just the catalyst the inn
needs for business to boom!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: So please, won't you reconsider? I beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'll see to it that there are no
repercussions to you, your races, or anything else!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Even still... I...
choice_data_list: Why don't you think it over once more?
I can't wait to see the completed posters!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not you too... Geez...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So you're coming along?! Yay, a photo shoot with
Ayabe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What do you wanna do at the inn? Hmm, I
wonder what they have.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I know! Hot springs! They have one, right?! Let's
get in together! Hot springs, hot springs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Urara, you do know we aren't going there for
fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Don't you want to soak in the hot springs?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I do—wait... Whether I want to or not is besides
the point.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! Of course you wanna enjoy the hot
springs! ♪ Let's dive in with a splash!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Urara... For the last time...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Admire Vega agrees to model for the
posters.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'll be there with you, so you'll do
just fine!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...It's not like I don't want to do it. That's not the
point...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Then, please! That indescribable aura of
yours—no, that bold charm like no other—I must
capture it in my posters!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that you symbolize the inn's
motto—"Hospitality with Sincerity"! Not to
mention the plethora of other reasons why I'm
asking you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I get it, I get it. You don't have to keep asking.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: D-does that mean—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it. Though I don't think I'll measure up to
your expectations...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't act like I already said yes. You can stop it
with the flattery, too.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
It's true! The charisma you're presenting in this
very moment would inspire thousands if captured
in my posters!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Like I said...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh ooh! I know lots of places where Ayabe looks
cool! Like, the other day, while we were out
running...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I see! It's guaranteed my posters will turn out
fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...All right, fine! I get it, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to be this annoying, it'll be less of
a hassle if I just do it.
